dashboard.ready: Ready to improve your customer support skills today?
dashboard.deescalationDesc: Practice handling angry customers and turning negative experiences into positive ones.

scenarios.title: Training Scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Select a scenario to start a simulated chat session.

1.title: The Angry Late Delivery
1.description: A customer is furious because their expedited package is 3 days late.
1.issue: Package tracking shows it has been stuck in transit for 3 days despite paying for overnight shipping.
1.initialMessage: Where is my package?! I paid $30 for overnight shipping three days ago and it's still not here! This is completely unacceptable!

2.title: Confused Elderly User
2.description: An older user is having trouble resetting their password.
2.customerPersona: Not tech-savvy, easily confused, polite but frustrated with themselves.
2.issue: Cannot figure out how to reset password. Keeps clicking the wrong link.
2.initialMessage: Hello dear, I'm trying to log into my account to see my grandson's photos but it says my password is wrong. I don't know how to fix it.

3.title: Billing Dispute
3.description: A customer was charged twice for their monthly subscription.
3.customerPersona: Suspicious, demands a refund immediately, threatens to dispute with bank.
3.issue: Double charge on credit card for the monthly subscription fee.
3.initialMessage: I just checked my bank statement and you guys charged me twice this month! I want a refund right now or I'm calling my bank to report fraud.

4.title: Feature Request
4.description: A power user wants a feature that does not exist yet.
4.issue: Wants a dark mode feature that is currently not on the roadmap.
4.initialMessage: Hi team! I love the app, but I really need a dark mode. I use it at night and it's blinding. When is this coming out?

simulator.placeholder: Type your response to the customer...
simulator.hint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line.
simulator.error: I'm sorry, I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again.
simulator.evalError: We couldn't generate an evaluation at this time due to a network error. Please review the transcript manually.
